title: jasione amethystina subsp. cavanillesii
intro: Jasione amethystina subsp. cavanillesii, also known as Cavanilles' Jasione, is a plant species in the bellflower family (Campanulaceae) native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Jasione amethystina subsp. cavanillesii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to ease cold and flu symptoms, as well as to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
